# Allow search engines to crawl all public pages
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block crawlers from trying non-existent admin/backend paths
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /api
Disallow: /wp-admin
Disallow: /wp-login
Disallow: /.env
Disallow: /config
Disallow: /private

Sitemap: https://javaque.com/sitemap.xml
